channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 Midyear Reckoning: Midyear Chaos
item.description: Moviegoers defend themselves against media tyranny.

item.title: The Never-Ending Panic About Liberalism
item.description: Theorists on the right and the left have tried to inflate a few policy disputes into national emergencies.

item.title: Iran Overplays Its Hand
item.description: It would be hard to argue with a straight face that Tehran’s position is particularly advantageous.

item.title: Democrats' divide over Israel tested in primary showdown for U.S. Senate
item.description: U.S. Senate candidate Haley Stevens is out to prove that a Democrat can stand with Israel in defiance of liberal activists and still win the party's n...
